items.headline: Russia Oil Revenues Halved in March Before War Boost
items.summary: Russian producers paid 494.9 billion rubles ($6.18 billion) in oil taxes last month, down 48 percent year on year, according to Bloomberg calculations based on Finance Ministry data released Friday.

items.headline: Russia’s Oil Revenues Halved in March Before Iran War Boost
items.summary: Russia’s oil tax revenue in March dropped by nearly half compared to a year earlier, highlighting the Kremlin’s financial strain just before the Middle East war delivered an unexpected boost to Moscow’s earnings.

items.headline: What to know about U.S. shifting targets, new deployments and diplomatic double game as conflict enters Day 30?
items.summary: The U.S.-Israeli campaign against Iran that began with targeted "decapitation" strikes on Feb. 28 has spiralled into a multi-front regional war with no end in sight.

items.headline: Iran's New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei Missing as IRGC Seizes Control, President Sidelined
items.summary: Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei remains unseen since March, sparking health speculation while IRGC blocks presidential appointments and controls information flow. Military council now mediates between President Pezeshkian and the Supreme Leader's office.

dimension_signal.rationale: Extended absence amid war suggests possible incapacitation or reduced control over power apparatus

items.headline: Netanyahu Avoids ICC Arrest by Skipping Davos 2026, Hungary Prepares Second Violation
items.summary: Netanyahu cancelled World Economic Forum attendance to avoid arrest warrant, while Hungary announces intention to host him again in March despite ICC obligations. Human Rights Watch demands Hungary comply with international law.

dimension_signal.rationale: Actively avoiding international jurisdiction demonstrates evasion of legal accountability mechanisms

items.headline: Pakistan Army Chief Munir Issues Nuclear Threats from US Soil, Targets Indian Economic Asset
items.summary: Field Marshal Asim Munir threatened to 'take half the world down' if Pakistan falls and specifically targeted India's Jamnagar refinery during Tampa speech. India condemned 'nuclear sabre-rattling' made from friendly country's territory.

dimension_signal.rationale: Public nuclear threats with specific targets made on ally's soil demonstrates reckless escalatory behavior

items.headline: Saudi Crown Prince MBS Pushes Trump to Continue Iran War Despite 'Productive' Ceasefire Claims
items.summary: Mohammed bin Salman reportedly urged Trump in multiple calls to maintain military pressure on Iran, fearing failed state scenario. Crown Prince warns premature withdrawal would leave Gulf facing 'emboldened and furious' Iran without Western backing.

dimension_signal.rationale: Prioritizing regime survival over regional stability by advocating continued warfare to prevent Iranian retaliation

items.headline: IAEA Chief Grossi Warns Iran Nuclear Stockpile Mystery Could Force 'No Guarantee' Declaration
items.summary: Rafael Grossi stated IAEA cannot verify Iran's 440.9kg of 60% enriched uranium after seven months without inspections of bombed facilities. Iran has not submitted required special report on nuclear materials following US-Israeli strikes.

items.headline: Iran's Nuclear Agency Pursues Legal Action Against IAEA Chief Over 'Inaction' During Facility Attacks
items.summary: Iran's Atomic Energy Organization announces legal review of IAEA Director General Rafael Grossi's response to attacks on nuclear facilities. Move follows fourth projectile strike near Bushehr power plant killing protection staff member.

items.headline: Pakistan Military Pursues ICBM Program as Citizens Suffer Under IMF Debt, US Assessment Reveals
items.summary: US Intelligence Community's 2026 Threat Assessment identifies Pakistan under Munir as developing ICBMs capable of threatening Western capitals while surviving on IMF support. Report cites 2025 Pahalgam attack as proof Pakistan-linked terror remains nuclear trigger.

dimension_signal.rationale: Prioritizing military capabilities over civilian welfare during economic crisis demonstrates misplaced resource allocation

items.headline: Turkey's Erdogan Declares Iran Conflict 'Geostrategic Impasse,' Prepares NATO Summit Despite Mediation Role
items.summary: President Erdogan tells NATO Secretary General Rutte that international community must intensify efforts to end Iran war. Turkey maintains dual strategy of mediation while hosting July 2026 NATO summit in Ankara and intercepting Iranian missiles.

dimension_signal.rationale: Balancing NATO obligations with regional peace mediation efforts demonstrates commitment to stability over conflict

items.headline: Iran's Assembly of Experts Held 'Unnatural' Online Election Under IRGC Pressure, Qom Office Bombed During Vote Count
items.summary: Assembly members describe March election atmosphere as pressured with limited debate time before IRGC-backed Mojtaba Khamenei selection. US-Israeli bombs struck Experts' office after votes cast but before count completed, targeting the electoral process itself.

dimension_signal.rationale: Selection through pressured process under military control undermines democratic legitimacy and institutional accountability

items.headline: Trump Mocks Saudi Crown Prince, Claims MBS 'Kissing My Ass' While War Pressures Continue
items.summary: Trump publicly humiliated Mohammed bin Salman at Miami investment forum, stating crown prince 'didn't think he'd be kissing my ass.' Comments contradict previous praise for MBS as 'warrior' fighting alongside America against Iran.

dimension_signal.rationale: Public humiliation of key ally demonstrates prioritizing personal dominance over strategic relationships

items.headline: Pakistan Field Marshal Munir Emerges as Key US-Iran Mediator, Delivers 15-Point Ceasefire Proposal
items.summary: Asim Munir positioned as central figure in mediation efforts between Washington and Tehran, helping deliver US proposal including uranium enrichment halt and Strait of Hormuz reopening. Pakistan leverages neutral status as non-targeted regional power.

dimension_signal.rationale: Taking constructive mediation role in regional conflict demonstrates diplomatic engagement over military confrontation
